comment: GFO reifies a general umbrella `Ontological_layer` class and splits it into `Stratum` (material/mental/social) and `Level` (physical/chemical/biological under Stratum; awareness/personality under Mental_stratum) branches. This is the clearest, most directly verified anchor for the candidate concept.

Corrected from the Codex draft's `overlap`/high-confidence framing. This is a settled, evidence-based exclusion, not an open scope call: a direct full-text search of the re-fetched 2021 paper found zero occurrences of "stratum", "strata", or "layer" for this partition, and its substance (endurant/perdurant; social-intentional entities) duplicates content already crosswalked in `continuant-occurrent.md` and `role.md`. This candidate was already admitted to the `0.3.0` batch on single-source (GFO-only) terms on 2026-07-06, so excluding UFO does not require a new scope decision -- it confirms the batch's original single-source framing rather than creating one. See `uncertainty-001` for the full resolution record.
DOLCE acknowledges layering/strata language in a property comment, but does not reify a comparable layer apparatus. Kept as a nearby cue, not a positive match.
YAMATO's level language is real source content, but in the checked report it stays local to quality-description and representation identity, not a general layer theory of reality.

No dedicated layer/stratum apparatus found -- directly re-verified 2026-07-07 against `21838-2/owl/bfo-core.ttl` (correcting a fetch-path error from the first attempt); zero occurrences of "stratu"/"layer"/"level" in the file.

No stratification apparatus found in `Merge.kif` -- directly re-verified 2026-07-07 against the current `ontologyportal/sumo` `Merge.kif`; `level` occurs only in measurement-unit contexts (`SoundPressureLevelUnit`, `Decibel`, `DecibelA`).

No layer/stratum apparatus found -- directly re-verified 2026-07-07 against `TUpper-Terms.html`, `tupper.all.owl`, and `tupper.clif`; zero occurrences of "stratu"/"layer"/"level" at all in any of the three files.

No layer/stratum apparatus found -- directly re-verified 2026-07-07 against `GUM-31.owl.txt`; zero occurrences of "stratu"/"layer"; the four `level` occurrences are descriptive-generality/clause-scope prose, not measurement contexts.
